SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model

Class AIcDocumentationReferenceTarget

java.lang.Object
eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model.AIcDocumentationElement
eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model.AIcDocumentationReferenceTarget
All Implemented Interfaces:
AIiDocumentationElement, AIiDocumentationElementWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget, AIiDocumentationReferenceTargetWriteAccess
public class AIcDocumentationReferenceTarget extends AIcDocumentationElement implements AIiDocumentationReferenceTargetWriteAccess
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationReferenceTargetWriteAccess.

See AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget for the read-only reference target contract.

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AIcDocumentationReferenceTarget(String aElementId, String aSourceSystemId, String aTargetKind, String aTargetId, String aQualifiedName, String aDisplayName)
    Creates a renderer-neutral semantic reference target.

  • Constructor Details

    • AIcDocumentationReferenceTarget

      public AIcDocumentationReferenceTarget(String aElementId, String aSourceSystemId, String aTargetKind, String aTargetId, String aQualifiedName, String aDisplayName)
      Creates a renderer-neutral semantic reference target.
      Parameters:
      aElementId - stable element identifier
      aSourceSystemId - source-system identifier, or an empty string if unspecified
      aTargetKind - stable renderer-neutral target kind
      aTargetId - stable source-specific target identifier
      aQualifiedName - qualified target name, or an empty string if unavailable
      aDisplayName - human-readable target name, or an empty string if unavailable

  • Method Details

    • getSourceSystemId

      public String getSourceSystemId()
      Description copied from interface: AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget
      Returns the source-system identifier of the target.

      Examples may include mps, java, or another generator namespace. An empty string means that the source system is unspecified.

      Specified by:
      getSourceSystemId in interface AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget
      Returns:
      source-system identifier, or an empty string if unspecified

    • getTargetKind

      public String getTargetKind()
      Description copied from interface: AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget
      Returns the target kind.

      The kind should be stable and renderer-neutral, for example mps.concept, mps.property, java.class, or another generator-defined kind.

      Specified by:
      getTargetKind in interface AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget
      Returns:
      target kind

    • getTargetId

      public String getTargetId()
      Description copied from interface: AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget
      Returns the stable target identifier.

      The identifier should be stable across generation runs and may be an MPS node identifier, Java binary name, generated documentation identifier, or another source-specific stable key.

      Specified by:
      getTargetId in interface AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget
      Returns:
      stable target identifier

    • getQualifiedName

      public String getQualifiedName()
      Description copied from interface: AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget
      Returns the target qualified name.

      An empty string means that no qualified name is available.

      Specified by:
      getQualifiedName in interface AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget
      Returns:
      qualified target name, or an empty string if unavailable

    • getDisplayName

      public String getDisplayName()
      Description copied from interface: AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget
      Returns the human-readable target display name.

      An empty string means that no display name is available and renderers may derive one from the qualified name or target identifier.

      Specified by:
      getDisplayName in interface AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget
      Returns:
      display name, or an empty string if unavailable
